_publications._publicationTitle: Feasibility of magnetic resonance-guided high-intensity focused ultrasound treatment targeting distinct nodular lesions in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: 57% of lesions (n = 68) were targetable for MR-HIFU based solely on location. Following, volumetric analysis and treatment planning, 30 lesions (25%) met criteria for complete ablation
resourceName: Profound Sonalleve V2 (Profound Medical Inc., Mississauga, Ontario, Canada)
details: 57% of lesions (68 out of 120) were targetable for MR-HIFU based on location, with complete ablation possible in 30 lesions and partial ablation >50% in 33 lesions
